explanation: Added a one-line global PyTorch precision setting so float32 matrix multiplications can use TF32 tensor cores on Ampere+ GPUs. This targets the dominant GEMM bottleneck without changing the model, optimizer, or loss.

changes.description: Enable TF32 matmul precision for float32 GEMMs on supported GPUs.

warnings: This can introduce small numerical drift versus strict float32, though training behavior is typically unchanged for this workload.
